# seLe4n Handbook

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generate_doc_navigation.py; edit docs/gitbook/navigation_manifest.json -->

This GitBook is the long-form guide for seLe4n — a production-oriented microkernel written in Lean 4 with machine-checked proofs, targeting Raspberry Pi 5.

## Current project state
- **Version:** 0.30.5 (Lean v4.28.0).
- **Codebase metrics:** ~103k production LoC across 142 files; ~15k test LoC across 24 suites (including AK3 regression suites, AK4 end-to-end ABI round-trip suite, AK7 foundational regression suite, AK8 model integrity suite, and the AK9 platform regression suite `tests/Ak9PlatformSuite.lean` — 35 end-to-end checks); ~3,045 theorem/lemma declarations (zero sorry/axiom).
- **Latest audit:** [`AUDIT_v0.29.0_COMPREHENSIVE`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.29.0_COMPREHENSIVE.md) — pre-1.0 full-kernel audit (2 CRITICAL, 23 HIGH, ~76 MED, ~101 LOW). WS-AK Phases AK1–AK9 complete (v0.29.1–v0.30.5); remaining AK10 targets v1.0.0.
- **Active workstream:** **WS-AK Phase AK9 audit remediation COMPLETE** (v0.30.5) — Platform / Boot / DTB / MMIO. Predecessor v0.30.4 delivered Phase AK9's 8 sub-tasks (AK9-A..AK9-H) addressing 2 HIGH, 7 MEDIUM, 13 LOW platform findings; v0.30.5 closed five audit gaps where the plan's intent had not been fully honored at the production-path level: (1) **AK9-A alias → rename** — `mmioReadByte` is the primary definition with `mmioRead` as `@[deprecated]` alias; two new positive correctness theorems complete the four-theorem-per-width contract; (2) **AK9-F P-M05 validation wired into production** — `bootFromPlatformChecked` now gates on `machineConfig.wellFormed` + `physicalAddressWidth ≤ 52` BEFORE IntermediateState construction; two soundness theorems expose the post-conditions; (3) **AK9-G P-M06 interrupts-enable wired into checked path** — `bootFromPlatformChecked` invokes `bootEnableInterruptsOp` at the end of the ok-branch per plan; new `_ok_interruptsEnabled` theorem; (4) **AK9-C end-to-end rejection tests** — two new tests exercise the full `bootFromPlatformChecked` chain; (5) **AK9-H P-L2 readCStringChecked** — new `Except DeviceTreeParseError (String × Nat)` variant distinguishes `.malformedBlob` from `.fuelExhausted`. Test suite expanded 21 → 34 tests. Prior: AK8 (v0.30.1–v0.30.3), WS-AM (v0.30.0), WS-AL (v0.29.14), AK7 (v0.29.13), AK6 (v0.29.9 + v0.29.12), AK5 (v0.29.5–v0.29.6), AK4 (v0.29.4–v0.29.8), AK3 (v0.29.3), AK2 (v0.29.2), AK1 (v0.29.1), **WS-AJ PORTFOLIO COMPLETE** (v0.28.1–v0.29.0), WS-AI (v0.27.7–v0.28.0), WS-AH (v0.27.2–v0.27.6), WS-AG (v0.26.0–v0.27.1), WS-AF–WS-B. **Next:** AK10 (Testing, Documentation & Closure) targeting v1.0.0.
- **Workstream history:** [`docs/WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md`](../WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md) — complete portfolio record and roadmap.
- **Hardware target:** Raspberry Pi 5 (ARM64).
- **Metrics source of truth:** [`docs/codebase_map.json`](../../docs/codebase_map.json) (`readme_sync` key). Cross-check with `./scripts/report_current_state.py`.
- **Historical records:** Milestone closeouts and prior audits in [`docs/dev_history/`](../dev_history/README.md).

Specification documents:

- **seLe4n project spec:** [`docs/spec/SELE4N_SPEC.md`](../spec/SELE4N_SPEC.md) -- normative scope, milestones, and acceptance criteria.
- **seL4 microkernel reference:** [`docs/spec/SEL4_SPEC.md`](../spec/SEL4_SPEC.md) -- detailed summary of the original seL4 kernel semantics.
